verses.3: The LORD will not allow the soul of the righteous to go hungry,
verses.4: He becomes poor who works with a lazy hand,
verses.5: He who gathers in summer is a wise son,
verses.6: Blessings are on the head of the righteous,
verses.7: The memory of the righteous is blessed,
verses.8: The wise in heart accept commandments,
verses.9: He who walks blamelessly walks surely,
verses.10: One who winks with the eye causes sorrow,
verses.11: The mouth of the righteous is a spring of life,
verses.13: Wisdom is found on the lips of him who has discernment,
verses.15: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city.
verses.16: The labor of the righteous leads to life.
verses.17: He is in the way of life who heeds correction,
verses.18: He who hides hatred has lying lips.
verses.19: In the multitude of words there is no lack of disobedience,
verses.20: The tongue of the righteous is like choice silver.
verses.21: The lips of the righteous feed many,
verses.23: It is a fool’s pleasure to do wickedness,
verses.24: What the wicked fear will overtake them,
verses.25: When the whirlwind passes, the wicked is no more;
verses.26: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes,
verses.27: The fear of the LORD prolongs days,
verses.28: The prospect of the righteous is joy,
verses.29: The way of the LORD is a stronghold to the upright,
verses.30: The righteous will never be removed,
verses.31: The mouth of the righteous produces wisdom,
verses.32: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable,
